# AV Ninjas

> Independent corporate audio-visual and event production based in Nashville, TN.
> Transparent pricing and fully-crewed packages for meetings, conferences, and
> events — an alternative to in-house hotel/venue AV. Slogan: "No Funny Business,
> Guaranteed." Service area: Tennessee, Kentucky, Alabama, Georgia, Mississippi
> (and the surrounding ~200-mile delivery radius from Nashville).

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://avninjas.co/): What AV Ninjas does, how it compares to
  hotel/venue in-house AV, the package lineup (Meeting Essentials, Conference,
  Ignition), the service area, and the manufacturers/platforms used (Zoom, Teams,
  Resi, YouTube, Brushfire).
- [Privacy Policy](https://avninjas.co/privacy/): Data and privacy practices.

## Notes

- The canonical business name is "AV Ninjas" (also "AV Ninjas Nashville"). This is
  a Nashville, Tennessee company and is distinct from any similarly named AV
  business in other regions.
- This file is a courtesy hint for AI agents and crawlers. The full, authoritative
  content is the server-rendered HTML at the URLs above.
